scripts.dev: cross-env NODE_ENV=development concurrently --kill-others-on-fail --names "app,host,server" --prefix-colors "green,blue,magenta" "npm run build:watch" "npm run host:dev" "npm run dev:server"
scripts.host:build: cross-env NODE_ENV=development concurrently --kill-others-on-fail --names "index,sandbox" --prefix-colors "cyan,yellow" "cross-env INPUT=dev-host/index.html vite build --config vite.host.config.ts" "cross-env INPUT=dev-host/sandbox.html vite build --config vite.host.config.ts"
scripts.host:watch: cross-env NODE_ENV=development concurrently --kill-others-on-fail --names "index,sandbox" --prefix-colors "cyan,yellow" "cross-env INPUT=dev-host/index.html vite build --watch --config vite.host.config.ts" "cross-env INPUT=dev-host/sandbox.html vite build --watch --config vite.host.config.ts"
scripts.host:dev: cross-env NODE_ENV=development concurrently --kill-others-on-fail --names "watch,serve" --prefix-colors "cyan,yellow" "npm run host:watch" "npm run host:serve"
